nasb.text: He who goes to and fro weeping, carrying his bag of seed, Shall indeed come again with a shout of joy, bringing his sheaves with him.

esv.text: He who goes out weeping, bearing the seed for sowing, shall come home with shouts of joy, bringing his sheaves with him.

cnv.text: 那帶著種子流著淚出去撒種的， 必帶著禾捆歡呼快樂地回來。

ccb.text: 含泪出去撒种的必欢呼着带回禾捆。

csbs.text: 那扛着种子、哭泣着出去的， 必定扛着禾捆，欢呼着回来。
